column67: Customer complained about being charged from the main balance when speaking to customer service. CM informed the customer that the matter would be forwarded for change and also stated that all operators charge from the main balance for such calls. However, as per the new update effective from 09.01.2026, the charging sequence is as follows: If the customer has available minutes, charges will be deducted from the minutes first. If no minutes are available but there is an emergency balance, charges will be deducted from the emergency balance. Only if neither minutes nor emergency balance is available, the charge will be deducted from the main balance. CM did not inform the customer about this updated charging policy.
